simple_types.name: Age_Type
simple_types.code:
type Age_Type is (
  X,
  A,
  B,
  C,
  D,
  E,
  F,
  G,
  H
                 );

enumeration_literals.name: X
enumeration_literals.description: --  In use throughout the ages/unknown -- the default

enumeration_literals.name: A
enumeration_literals.description: archaic     --  Very early forms, obsolete by classical times

enumeration_literals.name: B
enumeration_literals.description: early       --  Early Latin, pre-classical, used for effect/poetry

enumeration_literals.name: C
enumeration_literals.description: classical   --  Limited to classical (~150 BC - 200 AD)

enumeration_literals.name: E
enumeration_literals.description: later       --  Latin not in use in Classical times (6-10), X'ian

enumeration_literals.name: H
enumeration_literals.description: modern      --  Coined recently, words for new things (19-20)

simple_types.name: Case_Type
simple_types.code:
type Case_Type is
  (X,
  Nom,
  Voc,
  Gen,
  Loc,
  Dat,
  Abl,
  Acc
  );

simple_types.name: Comparison_Type
Frequency_Type
simple_types.code:
type Frequency_Type is (
  X,
  A,
  B,
  C,
  D,
  E,
  F,
  I,
  M,
  N
                       );

enumeration_literals.name: A
enumeration_literals.description: very freq   --  Very frequent, in all Elementry Latin books

enumeration_literals.name: C
enumeration_literals.description: common      --  For Dictionary, in top 10,000 words

enumeration_literals.name: D
enumeration_literals.description: lesser      --  For Dictionary, in top 20,000 words

enumeration_literals.name: F
enumeration_literals.description: very rare   --  Having only single citation in OLD or L+S

enumeration_literals.name: N
enumeration_literals.description: Pliny       --  Appearing (almost) only in Pliny Natural History

simple_types.name: Gender_Type
simple_types.code:
type Gender_Type is
  (X,
  M,
  F,
  N,
  C
  );

simple_types.name: Mood_Type
simple_types.code:
type Mood_Type is
  (X,
  Ind,
  Sub,
  Imp,
  Inf,
  Ppl
  );

simple_types.name: Noun_Kind_Type
simple_types.code:
type Noun_Kind_Type is
   (X,
   S,
   M,
   A,
   G,
   N,
   P,
   T,
   L,
   W
   );

enumeration_literals.name: M
enumeration_literals.description: plural or Multiple "only" --  not really used

simple_types.name: Numeral_Sort_Type
simple_types.code:
type Numeral_Sort_Type is
  (X,
  Card,
  Ord,
  Dist,
  Adverb
  );

simple_types.name: Part_Of_Speech_Type
simple_types.code:
type Part_Of_Speech_Type is
  (X,
  N,
  Pron,
  Pack,
  Adj,
  Num,
  Adv,
  V,
,
  …,
  Suffix
  );

enumeration_literals.name: Interj
enumeration_literals.description:
INTERJection
keep tackon/prefix/suffix together, as they are used in range queries

simple_types.name: Pronoun_Kind_Type
simple_types.code:
type Pronoun_Kind_Type is
   (X,
   Pers,
   Rel,
   Reflex,
   Demons,
   Interr,
   Indef,
   Adject
   );

simple_types.name: Stem_Key_Type
simple_types.code: type Stem_Key_Type is new Natural range 0 .. 9;

simple_types.name: Tense_Type
simple_types.code:
type Tense_Type is
  (X,
  Pres,
  Impf,
  Fut,
  Perf,
  Plup,
  Futp
  );

simple_types.name: Verb_Kind_Type
simple_types.code:
type Verb_Kind_Type is
   (X,
   To_Be,
   To_Being,
   Gen,
   Dat,
   Abl,
   Trans,
   Intrans,
,
   …,
   Perfdef
   );

enumeration_literals.name: To_Being
enumeration_literals.description: compounds of the verb to be (esse)

enumeration_literals.name: Impers
enumeration_literals.description:
IMPERSonal verb (implied subject 'it', 'they', 'God')
agent implied in action, subject in predicate

enumeration_literals.name: Dep
enumeration_literals.description:
DEPonent verb
only passive form but with active meaning

enumeration_literals.name: Semidep
enumeration_literals.description:
SEMIDEPonent verb (forms perfect as deponent)
(perfect passive has active force)

array_types.name: Inflection_Array
array_types.code: type Inflection_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Inflection_Record;

array_types.name: Inflection_Array_Index
array_types.code:
type Inflection_Array_Index is array (Integer range <>,
  Character range <>) of Integer;

array_types.name: Quality_Array
array_types.code: type Quality_Array is array (Integer range <>) of Quality_Record;

record_types.name: Adjective_Record
Adverb_Record
Conjunction_Record
record_types.code: type Conjunction_Record is null record;

record_types.name: Decn_Record
Ending_Record
Inflection_Record
Interjection_Record
record_types.code: type Interjection_Record is null record;

record_types.name: Noun_Record
Numeral_Record
Prefix_Record
record_types.code: type Prefix_Record is null record;

record_types.name: Preposition_Record
Pronoun_Record
Propack_Record
Quality_Record
Suffix_Record
record_types.code: type Suffix_Record is null record;

record_types.name: Supine_Record
Tackon_Record
record_types.code: type Tackon_Record is null record;

record_types.name: Tense_Voice_Mood_Record
Verb_Record
Vpar_Record

subtypes.name: Ending_Size_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Ending_Size_Type is Integer range 0 .. Max_Ending_Size;

constants.name: Null_Inflection_Record
constants.code:
Null_Inflection_Record : constant Inflection_Record :=
   (Null_Quality_Record, 0, Null_Ending_Record, X, X);
